channel.title: Yves in China
channel.description: CN-Life is Blog site about the life in China, covering Chinese lifestyle, scenery, tech, and etc.

item.title: Welcome to my Blog!
item.description: I’m kicking things off with this first post to give you a quick tour of what this blog is all about.

item.title: What is "Little E-Donkey"? Decoding Chinese Favorite Ride
item.description: "Little E-Donkey" is the true king of transportation in the bustling streets of China. In this post, We decode this unique ride, from its baffling "windshield quilt" to how it powers Chinese daily hustle. Discover why it is totally different from Western e-bikes and the ultimate symbol of local life. Put on your helmet for a deep dive into the world of the Little E-Donkey!

item.title: The 2026 World Cup is Here. So, What’s Going On with Chinese Football?
item.description: "Little E-Donkey" is the true king of transportation in the bustling streets of China. In this post, We decode this unique ride, from its baffling "windshield quilt" to how it powers Chinese daily hustle. Discover why it is totally different from Western e-bikes and the ultimate symbol of local life. Put on your helmet for a deep dive into the world of the Little E-Donkey!
